title: eryngium integrifolium
intro: Eryngium integrifolium, also known as the button snakeroot or button eryngium, is a perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Eryngium integrifolium include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting healing and preventing scarring. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
